context: Agent must create a GitHub Actions CI workflow and package.json with markdownlint-cli2 configuration for a repository with no existing docs automation.

checklist.name: workflow_triggers
checklist.description: Workflow YAML has on: sections for push to main and pull_request to main.

checklist.name: uses_markdownlint_cli2
checklist.description: Workflow runs markdownlint-cli2 (via npm run lint:md or directly) as the lint command.

checklist.name: no_rules_disabled
checklist.description: The .markdownlint.json has default: true and no rule is set to false.

checklist.name: md013_configured
checklist.description: MD013 configured for 120 character line length with code_blocks and tables disabled.

checklist.name: md033_allowed_elements
checklist.description: MD033 config includes details, summary, br, and img in allowed_elements.

checklist.name: build_fails_on_errors
checklist.description: Workflow does not use || true or any error-suppression pattern. Build exits non-zero on lint errors.

checklist.name: package_json_script
checklist.description: package.json includes lint:md script running markdownlint-cli2 with correct globs and ignores.
